findings.title: Pipeline Consolidation Summary
findings.description: Consolidated 43 findings from 7 agents into 33 unique findings. Removed 10 duplicates. Identified 3 cross-agent conflicts.

findings.title: Top Priority Findings
findings.description: Highest priority items based on weighted scoring (user_impact×0.35 + business_value×0.30) / (effort×0.20 + risk×0.15): Primary KPI: Notification Click-Through Rate (CTR) (score=4.042); Primary KPI: Unsubscribe Rate (score=4.042); North Star Metric: User Engagement (score=3.548); Add User Preference Page for Notification Categories (score=3.548); Monitor Notification Delivery Performance (score=3.143)

top_priorities.title: Add User Preference Page for Notification Categories

findings.title: Cross-Agent Conflict Resolution Report
findings.description: Resolved 3 conflicts between agent findings. risk-002 vs feasibility-002: Critical mobile notification delivery issues on Android 14 pose a risk to user engagement, which is also flagged as a critical risk requiring urgent attention.; risk-005 vs requirements-011: Lack of compliance documentation for notification features may lead to legal and accessibility standard violations, which is critical and needs to be addressed.; risk-003 vs requirements-006: The need to reduce notification delivery latency poses a high risk to performance, while the requirement to improve latency is also critical.

evidence.excerpt: Critical mobile notification delivery issues on Android 14 pose a risk to user engagement, which is also flagged as a critical risk requiring urgent attention.
Lack of compliance documentation for notification features may lead to legal and accessibility standard violations, which is critical and needs to be addressed.
The need to reduce notification delivery latency poses a high risk to performance, while the requirement to improve latency is also critical.

conflicts.description: Critical mobile notification delivery issues on Android 14 pose a risk to user engagement, which is also flagged as a critical risk requiring urgent attention.
conflicts.resolution: Prioritize immediate fixes for Android 14 push notification delivery issues to mitigate user engagement risks.
conflicts.reasoning: Addressing the delivery issues is essential to maintain user engagement and satisfaction, which is critical for the platform's success.

conflicts.description: Lack of compliance documentation for notification features may lead to legal and accessibility standard violations, which is critical and needs to be addressed.
conflicts.resolution: Develop and implement compliance documentation for notification features as a priority to ensure adherence to legal and accessibility standards.
conflicts.reasoning: Compliance is critical to avoid legal repercussions and ensure the product meets necessary standards, thus it must be prioritized.

conflicts.description: The need to reduce notification delivery latency poses a high risk to performance, while the requirement to improve latency is also critical.
conflicts.resolution: Implement architectural changes to optimize the delivery pipeline while ensuring that performance risks are managed through thorough testing.
conflicts.reasoning: Reducing latency is critical for user experience, but it must be balanced with the need to mitigate risks associated with architectural changes.

summary: Consolidated 43 findings into 33 unique items. Removed 10 duplicates, resolved 3 conflicts. Top priority: Primary KPI: Notification Click-Through Rate (CTR).
